examples: Animism is the doctrine or theory of the soul.

Small segments of the population practise Hinduism or animism.
There is a polyglot of deities, holdovers from ancient rural animism, including earth gods, sea gods, kitchen gods and hundreds of patron saints.
He believes that the shift from animism to centralized religion, and from an egalitarian to a hierarchical society, was the cause and not the effect of economic change.
